svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="YAT scenario authoring" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="postcutover-singleaz" name="YAT — Start of AT3 (post-cutover, single-AZ)"> <mxGraphModel dx="1747" dy="1191" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1700" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="YAT Network Topology — Post-Cutover (LMS in AWS, single-AZ baseline; campus services on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1620" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="internet" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=14;" value="Internet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="780" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="firewall" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Edge Firewall / Router
(redundant — no SPOF)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="370" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=12;" value="VPN Server
(staff-only remote access)
SPOF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="60" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2svpn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Site-to-Site VPN
Campus ↔ AWS
LDAP back-traffic + ICT mgmt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="640" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_int_fw" edge="1" parent="1" source="internet" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="firewall"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_vpn" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;" target="vpn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_s2s" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;strokeWidth=2;" target="s2svpn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffzone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E0F2F1;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Staff Network Zone (on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="720" x="40" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#B2DFDB;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=12;" value="Staff Zone Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="280" x="260" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_staffsw" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="staffsw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller 1
AD / DHCP / DNS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="70" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dc2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Controller 2
AD / DHCP / DNS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="260" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sysmgmt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="System Management Server
Monitoring + nightly backups" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="450" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appsvc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Application Services Server
Accounting / Office Admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="70" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lmsremoved" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="(LMS Server decommissioned
at cutover — migrated to AWS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="290" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nasstaff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="NAS — Staff Zone
RAID-5, hot-swap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="530" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffpc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Staff Desktops
~25 × Windows 10 Enterprise (AD-joined)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="70" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mfp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#00695C;fontSize=11;" value="Multifunction Printers
~5 staff locations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="410" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc1" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_dc2" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="dc2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_sysmgmt" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="sysmgmt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_appsvc" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="appsvc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_nas" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="nasstaff"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_pc" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="staffpc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sw_mfp" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#00695C;" target="mfp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentzone" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="Student Network Zone (on-premises)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="380" x="780" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentsw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=12;" value="Student Zone Switch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="850" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fw_studentsw" edge="1" parent="1" source="firewall" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="studentsw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nasstudent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="NAS — Student Zone
RAID-5, hot-swap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="810" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studentpc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="Student Desktops
~80 × Windows 10 Enterprise
+ O365 Education (AD-joined)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="320" x="810" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="classprinter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57F17;fontSize=11;" value="Classroom Printers
~15 — one per classroom" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="810" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_nas" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="nasstudent"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_pc" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="studentpc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_studsw_print" edge="1" parent="1" source="studentsw" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F57F17;" target="classprinter"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="awsregion" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;dashed=0;" value="AWS Region — ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="470" x="1190" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vpc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;" value="VPC 10.0.0.0/16" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="640" width="430" x="1210" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="igw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontSize=11;" value="Internet Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="1230" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vgw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=11;" value="VPN Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="1430" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_int_igw" edge="1" parent="1" source="internet" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="igw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1310" y="280" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_s2s_vgw" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2svpn" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="vgw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pubsuba" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Public Subnet public-web-a
10.0.1.0/24 (ap-southeast-2a)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="390" x="1230" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;" value="Application Load Balancer
HTTPS:443" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="1250" y="475" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="natgw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;" value="NAT Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="1470" y="475" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appsuba" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Private Subnet private-app-a
10.0.11.0/24 (ap-southeast-2a)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="390" x="1230" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec2lms" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;" value="EC2 — LMS application
Windows Server 2016 + DOODLE
Auto Scaling Group (min=1, max=2)
⚠ single-AZ baseline — not HA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="330" x="1260" y="615" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="datasuba" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBEE;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Private Subnet private-data-a
10.0.21.0/24 (ap-southeast-2a)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="390" x="1230" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rds" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;" value="Amazon RDS for MySQL
single-AZ baseline
⚠ not HA — failover via point-in-time restore only" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="330" x="1260" y="795" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_alb_ec2" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;" target="ec2lms"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ec2_rds" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2lms" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;" target="rds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_igw_alb" edge="1" parent="1" source="igw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;" target="alb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_natgw_ec2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2lms" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;" target="natgw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_vgw_ec2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ec2lms" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;dashed=1;" target="vgw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;" value="Legend
━━━ On-prem network plumbing
━━━ Site-to-Site VPN (LDAP back-traffic, ICT mgmt)
┄┄┄ Outbound / management flows (NAT, AD-LDAP, ICT)
Dashed boxes: AWS subnets (single-AZ — HA hardening pending)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="500" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
